verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit autem Beseleel et arcam de lignis setim, habentem duos semis cubitos in longitudine, et cubitum ac semissem in latitudine, altitudo quoque unius cubiti fuit et dimidii : vestivitque eam auro purissimo intus ac foris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ בְּצַלְאֵ֛ל אֶת־הָאָרֹ֖ן עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים אַמָּתַ֨יִם וָחֵ֜צִי אׇרְכּ֗וֹ וְאַמָּ֤ה וָחֵ֙צִי֙ רׇחְבּ֔וֹ וְאַמָּ֥ה וָחֵ֖צִי קֹמָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Beseleel made also, the ark of setim wood: it was two cubits and a half in length, and a cubit and a half in breadth, and the height was of one cubit and a half: and he overlaid it with the purest gold within and without.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Betsaleel teki arkin sittimipuusta: puolikolmatta kyynärää pitkän, puolitoista kyynärää leviän, ja puolitoista kyynärää korkian.
verses.king_james: And Bezaleel made the ark of shittim wood: two cubits and a half was the length of it, and a cubit and a half the breadth of it, and a cubit and a half the height of it:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit illi coronam auream per gyrum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַפֵּ֛הוּ זָהָ֥ב טָה֖וֹר מִבַּ֣יִת וּמִח֑וּץ וַיַּ֥עַשׂ ל֛וֹ זֵ֥ר זָהָ֖ב סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made to it a crown of gold round about,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja silasi sen puhtaalla kullalla, sekä sisältä että ulkoa, ja teki sen ympärille kultaisen vanteen.
verses.king_james: And he overlaid it with pure gold within and without, and made a crown of gold to it round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: conflans quatuor annulos aureos per quatuor angulos ejus : duos annulos in latere uno, et duos in altero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּצֹ֣ק ל֗וֹ אַרְבַּע֙ טַבְּעֹ֣ת זָהָ֔ב עַ֖ל אַרְבַּ֣ע פַּעֲמֹתָ֑יו וּשְׁתֵּ֣י טַבָּעֹ֗ת עַל־צַלְעוֹ֙ הָֽאֶחָ֔ת וּשְׁתֵּי֙ טַבָּעֹ֔ת עַל־צַלְע֖וֹ הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: Casting four rings of gold at the four corners thereof: two rings in one side, and two in the other.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja valoi neljä kultarengasta hänen neljään kulmaansa: kaksi rengasta yhdelle puolelle, ja myös kaksi rengasta toiselle puolelle.
verses.king_james: And he cast for it four rings of gold, to be set by the four corners of it; even two rings upon the one side of it, and two rings upon the other side of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vectes quoque fecit de lignis setim, quos vestivit auro,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ בַּדֵּ֖י עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים וַיְצַ֥ף אֹתָ֖ם זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made bars of setim wood, which he overlaid with gold,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki korennot sittimipuusta, ja silasi ne kullalla.
verses.king_james: And he made staves of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: et quos misit in annulos, qui erant in lateribus arcæ ad portandum eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֵ֤א אֶת־הַבַּדִּים֙ בַּטַּבָּעֹ֔ת עַ֖ל צַלְעֹ֣ת הָאָרֹ֑ן לָשֵׂ֖את אֶת־הָאָרֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he put them into the rings that were at the sides of the ark to carry it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pisti ne korennot renkaisiin arkin sivulle, niin että arkki taidettiin kannettaa.
verses.king_james: And he put the staves into the rings by the sides of the ark, to bear the ark.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit et propitiatorium, id est, oraculum, de auro mundissimo, duorum cubitorum et dimidii in longitudine, et cubiti ac semis in latitudine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ כַּפֹּ֖רֶת זָהָ֣ב טָה֑וֹר אַמָּתַ֤יִם וָחֵ֙צִי֙ אׇרְכָּ֔הּ וְאַמָּ֥ה וָחֵ֖צִי רׇחְבָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the propitiatory, that is, the oracle, of the purest gold, two cubits and a half in length, and a cubit and a half in breadth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki armo-istuimen puhtaasta kullasta, puolikolmatta kyynärää pitkän ja puolitoista kyynärää leviän.
verses.king_james: And he made the mercy seat of pure gold: two cubits and a half was the length thereof, and one cubit and a half the breadth thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duos etiam cherubim ex auro ductili, quos posuit ex utraque parte propitiatorii :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֛עַשׂ שְׁנֵ֥י כְרֻבִ֖ים זָהָ֑ב מִקְשָׁה֙ עָשָׂ֣ה אֹתָ֔ם מִשְּׁנֵ֖י קְצ֥וֹת הַכַּפֹּֽרֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Two cherubims also of beaten gold, which he set on the two sides of the propitiatory:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki kaksi Kerubimia kullasta: vahvaa tekoa, molempiin päihin armo-istuinta.
verses.king_james: And he made two cherubims of gold, beaten out of one piece made he them, on the two ends of the mercy seat;

verses.latin_vulgate: cherub unum in summitate unius partis, et cherub alterum in summitate partis alterius : duos cherubim in singulis summitatibus propitiatorii,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּרוּב־אֶחָ֤ד מִקָּצָה֙ מִזֶּ֔ה וּכְרוּב־אֶחָ֥ד מִקָּצָ֖ה מִזֶּ֑ה מִן־הַכַּפֹּ֛רֶת עָשָׂ֥ה אֶת־הַכְּרֻבִ֖ים מִשְּׁנֵ֥י (קצוותו) [קְצוֹתָֽיו]׃
verses.douay_rheims: One cherub in the top of one side, and the other cherub in the top of the other side: two cherubims at the two ends of the propitiatory,
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhden Kerubimin tähän päähän, ja toisen Kerubimin toiseen päähän: molempiin päihin armo-istuinta hän teki Kerubimit.
verses.king_james: One cherub on the end on this side, and another cherub on the other end on that side: out of the mercy seat made he the cherubims on the two ends thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: extendentes alas, et tegentes propitiatorium, seque mutuo et illud respicientes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֣וּ הַכְּרֻבִים֩ פֹּרְשֵׂ֨י כְנָפַ֜יִם לְמַ֗עְלָה סֹֽכְכִ֤ים בְּכַנְפֵיהֶם֙ עַל־הַכַּפֹּ֔רֶת וּפְנֵיהֶ֖ם אִ֣ישׁ אֶל־אָחִ֑יו אֶ֨ל־הַכַּפֹּ֔רֶת הָי֖וּ פְּנֵ֥י הַכְּרֻבִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Spreading their wings, and covering the propitiatory, and looking one towards the other, and towards it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kerubimit levittivät siipensä sen ylitse, ja peittivät armo-istuimen siivillänsä, ja heidän kasvonsa olivat toinen toisensa puoleen: armo-istuimeen päin olivat Kerubimien kasvot.
verses.king_james: And the cherubims spread out their wings on high, and covered with their wings over the mercy seat, with their faces one to another; even to the mercy seatward were the faces of the cherubims.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit et mensam de lignis setim in longitudine duorum cubitorum, et in latitudine unius cubiti, quæ habebat in altitudine cubitum ac semissem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָ֖ן עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים אַמָּתַ֤יִם אׇרְכּוֹ֙ וְאַמָּ֣ה רׇחְבּ֔וֹ וְאַמָּ֥ה וָחֵ֖צִי קֹמָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the table of setim wood, in length two cubits, and in breadth one cubit, and in height it was a cubit and a half.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös pöydän sittimipuusta, kaksi kyynärää pitkäksi, kyynärää leviäksi, ja puolitoista kyynärää korkiaksi.
verses.king_james: And he made the table of shittim wood: two cubits was the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof, and a cubit and a half the height thereof:

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdeditque eam auro mundissimo, et fecit illi labium aureum per gyrum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֥ף אֹת֖וֹ זָהָ֣ב טָה֑וֹר וַיַּ֥עַשׂ ל֛וֹ זֵ֥ר זָהָ֖ב סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he overlaid it with the finest gold, and he made to it a golden ledge round about,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja silasi sen puhtaalla kullalla, ja teki kultaisen vanteen sen ympärille.
verses.king_james: And he overlaid it with pure gold, and made thereunto a crown of gold round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: ipsique labio coronam auream interrasilem quatuor digitorum, et super eamdem, alteram coronam auream.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַשׂ ל֥וֹ מִסְגֶּ֛רֶת טֹ֖פַח סָבִ֑יב וַיַּ֧עַשׂ זֵר־זָהָ֛ב לְמִסְגַּרְתּ֖וֹ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to the ledge itself he made a polished crown of gold, of four fingers breadth, and upon the same another golden crown.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki partaan sen ympärille kämmentä leviän: teki myös kultaisen vanteen partaan ympärille.
verses.king_james: Also he made thereunto a border of an handbreadth round about; and made a crown of gold for the border thereof round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fudit et quatuor circulos aureos, quos posuit in quatuor angulis per singulos pedes mensæ
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּצֹ֣ק ל֔וֹ אַרְבַּ֖ע טַבְּעֹ֣ת זָהָ֑ב וַיִּתֵּן֙ אֶת־הַטַּבָּעֹ֔ת עַ֚ל אַרְבַּ֣ע הַפֵּאֹ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֖ר לְאַרְבַּ֥ע רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he cast four rings of gold, which he put in the four corners at each foot of the table,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja valoi siihen neljä kultaista rengasta, ja pani ne renkaat neljälle kulmalle heidän neljän jalkansa päälle.
verses.king_james: And he cast for it four rings of gold, and put the rings upon the four corners that were in the four feet thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: contra coronam : misitque in eos vectes, ut possit mensa portari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֻמַּת֙ הַמִּסְגֶּ֔רֶת הָי֖וּ הַטַּבָּעֹ֑ת בָּתִּים֙ לַבַּדִּ֔ים לָשֵׂ֖את אֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Over against the crown: and he put the bars into them, that the table might be carried.
verses.finnish_biblia: Juuri partaan kohdalla olivat renkaat, joissa korennot olivat sisällä, joilla pöytä kannettiin.
verses.king_james: Over against the border were the rings, the places for the staves to bear the table.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsos quoque vectes fecit de lignis setim, et circumdedit eos auro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ אֶת־הַבַּדִּים֙ עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֔ים וַיְצַ֥ף אֹתָ֖ם זָהָ֑ב לָשֵׂ֖את אֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The bars also themselves he made of setim wood, and overlaid them with gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki myös korennot sittimipuusta, ja silasi ne kullalla, että pöytä niillä kannettaa taidettiin.
verses.king_james: And he made the staves of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold, to bear the table.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vasa ad diversos usus mensæ, acetabula, phialas, et cyathos, et thuribula, ex auro puro, in quibus offerenda sunt libamina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ אֶֽת־הַכֵּלִ֣ים ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הַשֻּׁלְחָ֗ן אֶת־קְעָרֹתָ֤יו וְאֶת־כַּפֹּתָיו֙ וְאֵת֙ מְנַקִּיֹּתָ֔יו וְאֶ֨ת־הַקְּשָׂוֺ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר יֻסַּ֖ךְ בָּהֵ֑ן זָהָ֖ב טָהֽוֹר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the vessels for the divers uses of the table, dishes, bowls, and cups, and censers of pure gold, wherein the libations are to be offered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös pöytäastiat, vadit, lusikat, ja maljat, ja pikarit, joilla ulos ja sisälle kaadettiin, puhtaasta kullasta.
verses.king_james: And he made the vessels which were upon the table, his dishes, and his spoons, and his bowls, and his covers to cover withal, of pure gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit et candelabrum ductile de auro mundissimo, de cujus vecte calami, scyphi, sphærulæque, ac lilia procedebant :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַמְּנֹרָ֖ה זָהָ֣ב טָה֑וֹר מִקְשָׁ֞ה עָשָׂ֤ה אֶת־הַמְּנֹרָה֙ יְרֵכָ֣הּ וְקָנָ֔הּ גְּבִיעֶ֛יהָ כַּפְתֹּרֶ֥יהָ וּפְרָחֶ֖יהָ מִמֶּ֥נָּה הָיֽוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the candlestick of beaten work of the finest gold. from the shaft whereof its branches, its cups, and bowls, and lilies came out:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös kynttiläjalan puhtaasta kullasta: vahvan tekoiseksi hän kynttiläjalan teki ja hänen vartensa, haaransa, maljansa, nuppinsa ja kukkaisensa olivat siitä samasta.
verses.king_james: And he made the candlestick of pure gold: of beaten work made he the candlestick; his shaft, and his branch, his bowls, his knops, and his flowers, were of the same:

verses.latin_vulgate: sex in utroque latere, tres calami ex parte una, et tres ex altera :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁשָּׁ֣ה קָנִ֔ים יֹצְאִ֖ים מִצִּדֶּ֑יהָ שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה ׀ קְנֵ֣י מְנֹרָ֗ה מִצִּדָּהּ֙ הָֽאֶחָ֔ד וּשְׁלֹשָׁה֙ קְנֵ֣י מְנֹרָ֔ה מִצִּדָּ֖הּ הַשֵּׁנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Six on the two sides: three branches on one side, and three on the other.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuusi haaraa kävi hänen kyljestänsä: kolme haaraa kynttiläjalan yhdeltä sivulta, ja myös kolme haaraa sen toiselta sivulta.
verses.king_james: And six branches going out of the sides thereof; three branches of the candlestick out of the one side thereof, and three branches of the candlestick out of the other side thereof:

verses.latin_vulgate: tres scyphi in nucis modum per calamos singulos, sphærulæque simul et lilia : et tres scyphi instar nucis in calamo altero, sphærulæque simul et lilia. Æquum erat opus sex calamorum, qui procedebant de stipite candelabri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה גְ֠בִעִ֠ים מְֽשֻׁקָּדִ֞ים בַּקָּנֶ֣ה הָאֶחָד֮ כַּפְתֹּ֣ר וָפֶ֒רַח֒ וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה גְבִעִ֗ים מְשֻׁקָּדִ֛ים בְּקָנֶ֥ה אֶחָ֖ד כַּפְתֹּ֣ר וָפָ֑רַח כֵּ֚ן לְשֵׁ֣שֶׁת הַקָּנִ֔ים הַיֹּצְאִ֖ים מִן־הַמְּנֹרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Three cups in manner of a nut on each branch, and bowls withal and lilies: and three cups of the fashion of a nut in another branch, and bowls withal and lilies. The work of the six branches, that went out from the shaft of the candlestick was equal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolme mandelin-muotoista maljaa oli sen yhdessä haarassa, ja yksi nuppi ja kukkainen, niin myös kolme mandelin-kaltaista maljaa toisessa haarassa, yksi nuppi ja kukkainen: niin oli niissä kuudessa haarassa, jotka kynttiläjalasta uloskävivät.
verses.king_james: Three bowls made after the fashion of almonds in one branch, a knop and a flower; and three bowls made like almonds in another branch, a knop and a flower: so throughout the six branches going out of the candlestick.

verses.latin_vulgate: In ipso autem vecte erant quatuor scyphi in nucis modum, sphærulæque per singulos simul et lilia :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַמְּנֹרָ֖ה אַרְבָּעָ֣ה גְבִעִ֑ים מְשֻׁ֨קָּדִ֔ים כַּפְתֹּרֶ֖יהָ וּפְרָחֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the shaft itself were four cups after the manner of a nut, and bowls withal at every one, and lilies:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kynttiläjalassa oli neljä mandelin-muotoista maljaa toisessa haarassa, nuppeinsa ja kukkaistensa kanssa,
verses.king_james: And in the candlestick were four bowls made like almonds, his knops, and his flowers:

verses.latin_vulgate: et sphærulæ sub duobus calamis per loca tria, qui simul sex fiunt calami procedentes de vecte uno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכַפְתֹּ֡ר תַּ֩חַת֩ שְׁנֵ֨י הַקָּנִ֜ים מִמֶּ֗נָּה וְכַפְתֹּר֙ תַּ֣חַת שְׁנֵ֤י הַקָּנִים֙ מִמֶּ֔נָּה וְכַפְתֹּ֕ר תַּֽחַת־שְׁנֵ֥י הַקָּנִ֖ים מִמֶּ֑נָּה לְשֵׁ֙שֶׁת֙ הַקָּנִ֔ים הַיֹּצְאִ֖ים מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And bowls under two branches in three places, which together made six branches going out from one shaft.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että nuppi oli siinä kahden haaran alla, ja taas nuppi (toisen) kahden haaran alla, ja vielä nuppi kahden jälkimmäisen haaran alla: nimittäin niissä kuudessa haarassa, jotka siitä uloskävivät,
verses.king_james: And a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, according to the six branches going out of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sphærulæ igitur, et calami ex ipso erant, universa ductilia ex auro purissimo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּפְתֹּרֵיהֶ֥ם וּקְנֹתָ֖ם מִמֶּ֣נָּה הָי֑וּ כֻּלָּ֛הּ מִקְשָׁ֥ה אַחַ֖ת זָהָ֥ב טָהֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: So both the bowls, and the branches were of the same, all beaten work of the purest gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen nuppinsa ja haaransa sen päällä, ja se kaikki oli puhtaasta lujasta kullasta.
verses.king_james: Their knops and their branches were of the same: all of it was one beaten work of pure gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit et lucernas septem cum emunctoriis suis, et vasa ubi ea, quæ emuncta sunt, extinguantur, de auro mundissimo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־נֵרֹתֶ֖יהָ שִׁבְעָ֑ה וּמַלְקָחֶ֥יהָ וּמַחְתֹּתֶ֖יהָ זָהָ֥ב טָהֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the seven lamps with their snuffers, and the vessels where the snuffings were to be put out, of the purest gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki myös seitsemän lamppua: ja heidän niistimensä ja sammutuskalunsa olivat puhtaasta kullasta.
verses.king_james: And he made his seven lamps, and his snuffers, and his snuffdishes, of pure gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Talentum auri appendebat candelabrum cum omnibus vasis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּכָּ֛ר זָהָ֥ב טָה֖וֹר עָשָׂ֣ה אֹתָ֑הּ וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־כֵּלֶֽיהָ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The candlestick with all the vessels thereof weighed a talent of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki sen, kaikkein astiainsa kanssa, yhdestä leiviskästä puhdasta kultaa.
verses.king_james: Of a talent of pure gold made he it, and all the vessels thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit et altare thymiamatis de lignis setim, per quadrum singulos habens cubitos, et in altitudine duos : e cujus angulis procedebant cornua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֛עַשׂ אֶת־מִזְבַּ֥ח הַקְּטֹ֖רֶת עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים אַמָּ֣ה אׇרְכּוֹ֩ וְאַמָּ֨ה רׇחְבּ֜וֹ רָב֗וּעַ וְאַמָּתַ֙יִם֙ קֹֽמָת֔וֹ מִמֶּ֖נּוּ הָי֥וּ קַרְנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the alter of incense of setim wood, being a cubit on every side foursquare, and in height two cubits: from the corners of which went out horns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös suitsutusalttarin sittimipuusta: yhtä kyynärää pitkän ja yhtä kyynärää leviän, juuri nelikulmaiseksi, ja kaksi kyynärää korkian; siitä uloskävivät hänen sarvensa.
verses.king_james: And he made the incense altar of shittim wood: the length of it was a cubit, and the breadth of it a cubit; it was foursquare; and two cubits was the height of it; the horns thereof were of the same.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vestivitque illud auro purissimo cum craticula ac parietibus et cornibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְצַ֨ף אֹת֜וֹ זָהָ֣ב טָה֗וֹר אֶת־גַּגּ֧וֹ וְאֶת־קִירֹתָ֛יו סָבִ֖יב וְאֶת־קַרְנֹתָ֑יו וַיַּ֥עַשׂ ל֛וֹ זֵ֥ר זָהָ֖ב סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he overlaid it with the purest gold, with its grate, and the sides, and the horns.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja silasi sen puhtaalla kullalla, sen katon ja seinät ympärinsä, ja sen sarvet: ja teki sen ympärille vanteen kullasta,
verses.king_james: And he overlaid it with pure gold, both the top of it, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns of it: also he made unto it a crown of gold round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque ei coronam aureolam per gyrum, et duos annulos aureos sub corona per singula latera, ut mittantur in eos vectes, et possit altare portari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁתֵּי֩ טַבְּעֹ֨ת זָהָ֜ב עָֽשָׂה־ל֣וֹ ׀ מִתַּ֣חַת לְזֵר֗וֹ עַ֚ל שְׁתֵּ֣י צַלְעֹתָ֔יו עַ֖ל שְׁנֵ֣י צִדָּ֑יו לְבָתִּ֣ים לְבַדִּ֔ים לָשֵׂ֥את אֹת֖וֹ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made to it a crown of gold round about, and two golden rings under the crown at each side, that the bars might be put into them, and the altar be carried.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaksi kultaista rengasta vanteen alle molemmin puolin, niin että korennot siihen sysättiin, kannettaa niillä.
verses.king_james: And he made two rings of gold for it under the crown thereof, by the two corners of it, upon the two sides thereof, to be places for the staves to bear it withal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsos autem vectes fecit de lignis setim, et operuit laminis aureis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַבַּדִּ֖ים עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֑ים וַיְצַ֥ף אֹתָ֖ם זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the bars themselves he made also of setim wood, and overlaid them with plates of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja korennot hän teki sittimipuusta, ja silasi ne kullalla.
verses.king_james: And he made the staves of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Composuit et oleum ad sanctificationis unguentum, et thymiama de aromatibus mundissimis opere pigmentarii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֜עַשׂ אֶת־שֶׁ֤מֶן הַמִּשְׁחָה֙ קֹ֔דֶשׁ וְאֶת־קְטֹ֥רֶת הַסַּמִּ֖ים טָה֑וֹר מַעֲשֵׂ֖ה רֹקֵֽחַ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: He compounded also the oil for the ointment of sanctification, and incense of the purest spices, according to the work of a perfumer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki pyhän voidellusöljyn ja puhtaan suitsutuksen, hyvänhajullisista yrteistä, apotekarin tavan jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And he made the holy anointing oil, and the pure incense of sweet spices, according to the work of the apothecary.
